column2:
Comparsion of fields from the selected list.
If recent file has more fields in this list then base file you have to remove some fields.

Mismatches compares all element values for the related field and count how many different values appears. Higher amount of mismatches might be an indicator for a new added field in the recent file's current list.

DEL will remove the recent field and update the view (re-calculate mismatches related to the removed field).

Analyze wil show a detailed comparsion of all element values from base file and recent files for the related field in the current list.

Keep the list offsets from the recent file.
Suspicious offsets are in lists: 0, 20, 100

For version 7 base file (1.2.6 server) you have to use base offsets from list 0, 20, 100 !!!

Use the list offsets from the base file instead from the recent file.
Suspicious offsets are in lists: 0, 20, 100

For version 7 base file (1.2.6 server) you have to use base offsets from list 0, 20, 100 !!!
